节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Adds an access record of a sensitive permission. or usedType in AddPermissionUsedRecordOptions is invalid.
注释信息: @param { int } tokenID - Token ID of the application.
@param { Permissions } permissionName - Name of the permission accessed.
@param { int } successCount - Number of successful accesses to the permission.
@param { int } failCount - Number of failed accesses to the permission.
@returns { Promise<void> } Promise that returns no value.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission denied. Interface caller does not have permission "ohos.permission.PERMISSION_USED_STATS".
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Not system app. Interface caller is not a system app.
@throws { BusinessError } 12100001 - Invalid parameter. The tokenID is 0, the permissionName exceeds 256 characters, the count value is invalid,
@throws { BusinessError } 12100002 - The specified tokenID does not exist or refer to an application process.
@throws { BusinessError } 12100003 - The specified permission does not exist or is not a user_grant permission.

parameters.说明: Number of successful accesses to the permission.
Number of failed accesses to the permission.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
Permission denied. Interface caller does not have permission "ohos.permission.PERMISSION_USED_STATS".
Not system app. Interface caller is not a system app.
Invalid parameter. The tokenID is 0, the permissionName exceeds 256 characters, the count value is invalid,
The specified tokenID does not exist or refer to an application process.
The specified permission does not exist or is not a user_grant permission.
